name: Ultimate CEO
description: Defeat the CEO to earn exclusive rewards and climb the rankings
tips: Focus on teams with high DPS and Fan Capacity bonuses

name: Fishing Event
description: Catch fish and earn rewards through the fishing mini-game
tips: Use bait strategically and participate in bonus hours

name: World Building
description: Build and upgrade your headquarters and other structures
tips: Prioritize HQ upgrades that increase revenue

name: Rally Event
description: Participate in group rallies to earn collective rewards
tips: Coordinate with group members and use rally-focused artists

name: TOP Season
description: Compete in the TOP leaderboard for exclusive rewards
tips: Build a balanced team with good defense and offense

name: Warm-up Event
description: Prepare for TOP season with warm-up challenges
tips: Use this time to test different team compositions

name: Single Car Challenge
description: Challenge content designed for single-car strategies
tips: Focus on artists with high single-target damage

name: Collectibles Event
description: Collect items from various regions for bonus stats
tips: Focus on one region at a time for maximum bonus
